command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.201 'sudo sed -i "/location \/wetty-ollama/a\    location /uptime { proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3010; proxy_http_version 1.1; proxy_set_header Upgrade \$http_upgrade; proxy_set_header Connection upgrade; proxy_set_header Host \$host; }" /etc/nginx/sites-available/wetty && sudo nginx -t && sudo systemctl reload nginx && echo NGINX_OK'
